finding_results.notes: Grounded the lead in this settlement's south-grain-loop position, made Breck's yard the actionable last confirmed sighting, and added concrete uncertainty and cost through the paid follow-up with Sorren, competing road reports, and active bounty traffic.
Made Vel's zero-drive explicitly Maren-shaped by naming the prior crossing, tying the journal to concrete sensory memory, and replacing abstract absence with a specific threshold image.
Repurposed the close so each remaining beat adds new work on the page: paid intel, Maren-specific pressure, concrete north-road risk, written pursuit notes, and an actual dawn departure.
Expanded the chapter to 5057 words while preserving the required heading contract.

summary: Expanded chapter 1 to 5057 words, strengthened the rumor's causal information chain through Olla/Sorren/Breck's yard logistics, gave Vel's zero-drive a concrete Maren-shaped emotional trace, and turned the closing into operational commitment plus actual departure.
